overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded character running through a medieval Middle Eastern city. The character traverses a dusty construction yard, crosses wooden bridges over excavated pits, passes through brick tunnels, and navigates narrow streets with hanging fabric canopies in a sunlit, hazy environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open construction yard with dirt piles and scaffolding

agents.ego_description: sprinting through the construction yard past workers and large piles of building materials

notable_agents.action: worker standing near a large dirt pile holding tools
worker walking past wooden scaffolding structure

entered.detail: large fortified building with crenellations and small windows
large mound of dark dirt or coal material
wooden support beams and planks against building
dark fabric canopy stretched over building entrance
small fire burning on the ground near dirt piles
wooden wheeled cart parked near construction materials

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dusty open construction yard filled with large piles of dirt, wooden scaffolding, and building materials. Workers are scattered throughout the area, and a fortified stone building with a black awning stands in the background under a bright hazy sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing over excavated construction pit

events.description: character steps onto wooden log bridge to cross the deep excavated pit

agents.ego_description: carefully running across the wooden log bridge spanning the deep pit

notable_agents.action: worker standing near the tunnel entrance watching the character

entered.detail: deep rectangular pit with wooden supports and logs at bottom
narrow bridge made of parallel wooden logs spanning the pit
large brick archway entrance leading to covered passage
tall earthenware jars stacked near the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a wooden log bridge over a deep excavated construction pit. Large clay jars sit near a brick archway tunnel entrance ahead, while the fortress building recedes to the left. Workers are visible near the tunnel approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered brick tunnel archway leading to plaza

events.description: character enters the covered brick tunnel from the bright exterior
character exits tunnel into bright sunlit open plaza

agents.ego_description: running through the dimly lit brick tunnel and emerging into a sunlit plaza

notable_agents.action: guard standing in the plaza near the tunnel exit
child running across the open plaza

entered.detail: heavy metal chains hanging from the tunnel ceiling
stacks of canvas sandbags flanking the tunnel entrance
large open public square with stone paving
tall palm tree visible above the plaza buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit brick tunnel with hanging chains and sandbags, then emerges into a bright sunlit plaza. The space opens up to reveal a large public square surrounded by stone buildings, with a palm tree visible in the distance and scattered pedestrians moving about.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with hanging fabric canopies

events.description: character enters narrow street with red hanging fabrics overhead

agents.ego_description: sprinting through the narrow street toward the distant gate tower

notable_agents.action: man carrying goods on his shoulder walking ahead
robed figure walking in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: red and beige fabric awnings stretched between buildings overhead
tall slender tower with balcony visible in the distance
fortified gate structure with crenellations at street end

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow street shaded by red and beige fabric canopies stretched between mud-brick buildings. The street leads toward a distant stone gate tower and minaret, with pedestrians walking ahead and stone walls enclosing the path on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dusty, open construction site into the shaded, narrow corridors of a medieval city. It begins with the character sprinting through a bright, hazy yard filled with dirt piles and wooden scaffolding, moving past workers toward a fortified stone building. As the character approaches a deep excavated pit, the camera follows them across a wooden log bridge and toward a brick archway flanked by large clay jars. The scene then shifts from the bright exterior into a dimly lit brick tunnel draped with chains and sandbags before emerging into a wide, sunlit public square with stone buildings and a distant palm tree. Finally, the camera glides into a narrow street shaded by red and beige fabric canopies, following the path between mud-brick walls toward a distant stone gate tower and minaret.
